title: Online Check-in
heroImageAlt: Window-seat view of a wing tip above coastal fjords at sunrise
intro: Skip the airport queue and pick your seat at home. Online check-in is operated by the airline that flies your flight — here is what you need and the typical windows for each major carrier from Colombo.

sections.p:
Most airlines open online check-in between 48 hours and 24 hours before departure, and close it between 90 minutes and 60 minutes before departure. The exact window for your flight is in your confirmation email or on the airline’s website.

TYPICAL OPENING WINDOWS for full-service airlines flying from Colombo (CMB):
• SriLankan Airlines, Emirates, Qatar Airways, Etihad, Singapore Airlines, Cathay Pacific — 48 hours before departure.
• Most low-cost carriers (AirAsia, IndiGo, FitsAir) — 14 to 24 hours before departure.

Your AIRLINE booking reference (PNR) — usually a 6-character code, found on the e-ticket we sent you (different from the FlyAir booking reference). Your PASSENGER SURNAME exactly as on the passport. For international flights have your PASSPORT and any required VISA ready to enter at check-in.

1. Open the operating airline’s website or app and click "Check in" / "Manage booking".
2. Enter your airline PNR and passenger surname.
3. Confirm passport and contact details (mandatory for international flights — APIS data).
4. Choose your seat. Many airlines charge for forward and exit-row seats; standard seats are usually free.
5. Pay for any extras you want to add (extra baggage is almost always cheaper online than at the airport).
6. Generate the boarding pass — save the PDF, add to your phone wallet, or print it.

At the airport, drop checked bags at the BAG-DROP counter (separate from check-in) before security.

sections.h: When online check-in is not allowed
sections.p:
You may be asked to check in at the airport instead if your booking includes:
• An infant or unaccompanied minor.
• Passenger requiring special assistance (wheelchair, medical case).
• Visa-on-arrival to your destination (the airline may want to verify documents in person).
• A group of more than nine travellers on the same booking.

In these cases, just arrive earlier — see below.

sections.h: How early to arrive at the airport
sections.p:
INTERNATIONAL flights: arrive at least 3 HOURS before departure. Check-in counters close 60 to 90 minutes before departure. CMB is a busy airport — passport control queues can take 20 to 40 minutes during peak hours.

DOMESTIC flights: arrive 90 minutes to 2 hours before departure for Sri Lankan domestic flights (Colombo airport CMB or Ratmalana RML).
The airline PNR is on the e-ticket email we sent you. If you cannot find it, write to info@flyair.lk with your FlyAir booking reference and we will look it up and send it back.
